content.body:
- New optional `boot` field in schema — any doc can be marked boot-critical
  regardless of type
- CLAUDE.md boot sequence simplified to single `boot: true` filter
- CLAUDE.md gains 3 override sections: Delegation, Feedback and corrections,
  Memory boundaries — resolves conflicts with Claude Code defaults
- New KB docs: task-pipeline-selection (rule), feedback-leo-must-delegate,
  feedback-kb-not-rules
- 16 existing KB docs marked boot: true
- self-hosting-notes and task-pipeline-selection promoted from pattern to rule

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat: add boot field to KB schema + CLAUDE.md overrides + pipeline selection
